title: neocupressus lusitanica
intro: Neocupressus lusitanica, also known as Cupressus lusitanica, is a species of coniferous tree native to the Iberian Peninsula in southwestern Europe. The medicinal properties of Neocupressus lusitanica include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and provide relief from skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. Neocupressus lusitanica can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are often used to promote relaxation and alleviate stress.
